name: Jyoti Structures Limited
summary: Jyoti Structures Limited engages in the design, sourcing, manufacturing, supply, construction, and testing of transmission lines, substations, and distribution projects in India and internationally. The company manufactures transmission line, microwave, and wind mill towers; sub-station switchyards; and solar power and rural electrification structures. Jyoti Structures Limited was incorporated in 1974 and is headquartered in Mumbai, India.
